entity.country_or_origin: ZKsync Era, opBNB, and Base ecosystems
entity.summary: Multichain concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange providing token swaps, liquidity pools, and active trading across ZKsync Era, opBNB, and Base deployments.
entity.notes: CoinGecko candidate data identifies the dedicated app.derpdex.com exchange domain. DefiLlama independently classifies DerpDEX as a multichain CLMM DEX across ZKsync Era, opBNB, and Base and reports current TVL, fees, and recent DEX volume. URL status remains live_unverified because the first-party application could not be fully fetched during this review pass.

evidence.title: DerpDEX official application
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party application domain is preserved and independently referenced by the exchange candidate corpus, but the application could not be fully fetched in this review pass, so URL status remains live_unverified.

evidence.title: DerpDEX metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry classifies DerpDEX as a CLMM DEX and reports current TVL, fees, and recent DEX volume across ZKsync Era, opBNB, and Base.

evidence.title: DerpDEX DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies DerpDEX across ZKsync Era, opBNB, and Base and corroborates the exchange entity identity.
